title: Reports; contents; due dates
doc_html:
§1553. Reports; contents; due dates

            The reports shall be filed at the same time, shall contain the same information, and shall be certified correct in the same manner as reports required by this Chapter for candidates.

            Acts 2011, No. 208, §1; Acts 2024, No. 390, §1.
doc_text:
§1553.  Reports; contents; due dates
The reports shall be filed at the same time, shall contain the same information, and
shall be certified correct in the same manner as reports required by this Chapter for
candidates.
Acts 2011, No. 208, §1; Acts 2024, No. 390, §1.
